findingDetails.title: Packet-local worked example is not shaped like the canonical nested templates
findingDetails.evidence: The packet-local example starts with `# Changelog - sk-doc parent root` and `## Summary`, while canonical nested templates include frontmatter, a date heading, and a spec-folder blockquote before generated sections.
findingDetails.recommendation: Replace the example with generator-shaped output matching root.md/phase.md, or label it as an excerpt that omits generated scaffolding.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Confined to references/worked_examples.md packet-local example; SKILL.md routes nested writes through the generator/templates and all target docs validate 0 issues.

noveltyJustification: First valid iteration found one new P2 traceability mismatch in a reference worked example; no prior active findings existed in the initialized registry.
edgeCases: Shared template prose still names stale NN--component paths; actual folders are plain names and packet records mismatch.
Packet-local changelog history has stale references/changelog_creation.md back-links outside this iteration's declared scope.
LEAF execution can complete only one iteration despite stop-policy=max-iterations.
integrationEvidence: validate_document.py --type changelog succeeds on packet-local changelog sample
command router and presentation assets resolve
